title: Audio / signal denoising architectures for DenoiseOpt NAS cells

design_notes.constraint: N=256 cycle + SEAM_W=8 residual bake on RTX 3090; prefer meaningful arch complexity over max it/s

implement_as_searchable_blocks.residual: ResNet-style residual MLP/conv on seam or cycle (He et al. style)
implement_as_searchable_blocks.dense: DenseNet-lite feature concat within tiny width budget
implement_as_searchable_blocks.unet: Tiny 1D U-Net encoder-decoder with skip (Wave-U-Net / speech U-Net inspired)
implement_as_searchable_blocks.conv1d: Shallow 1D conv stack on cycle neighborhood of seam
implement_as_searchable_blocks.dilated: Dilated TCN-style 1D conv (Conv-TasNet / TCN inspired, tiny)
implement_as_searchable_blocks.attn: Lightweight multi-head self-attention on seam tokens (tiny dim)
implement_as_searchable_blocks.gated: Gated residual / soft blend of ops
implement_as_searchable_blocks.noise_cond: Noise-level conditioned residual (tiny diffusion/score step proxy)

screened_heavy_for_overnight.full_demucs_htdemucs: multi-scale / multi-band / large STFT hybrids — too slow per trial
screened_heavy_for_overnight.full_diffusion_sampling: multi-step reverse SDE/ODE sampling — keep only 1 noise-cond residual step
screened_heavy_for_overnight.full_gan_train: SEGAN/MetricGAN discriminator training loops — optional tiny adv loss term only
screened_heavy_for_overnight.large_transformers: Whisper-scale / Conformer-large — dim/head capped for seam bake

design_notes.outer_loop: PPO + PBT population over arch graphs/strings; discrete NAS mutations
design_notes.claim_hygiene: algorithm names accurate (PPO, PBT, discrete NAS); no false SOTA claims
